prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically addresses charity trustee expenses within the context of UK legislation and governance, which is not applicable to Scotland. Scotland has its own regulatory framework pertaining to charities under the Office of the Scottish Charity Regulator (OSCR), which has different guidelines and policies.
